Sikkim is one of the most beautiful states in India. And surprisingly a fairly prosperous one[1].Thankfully, the mistake of Tibet where India helped Chinese army was not repeated.[2]1 - https://ashishb.net/travel/gorkhaland-west-bengal-and-sikkim...
2 - https://latest.sundayguardianlive.com/news/nehrus-india-help...
I still don’t get how the world cares so much about conflicts in other parts of the world but ignores the colonization and takeover of Tibet by the CCP
